title: brain_session_carry_forward
description: Continuity bundle emitted at session_archived OR scheduler tick (idle > N hours). Lists unresolved questions / promises / followups that the next session should remember. Memory_Recall Tier F surfaces these to Final_Composer system prompt for cross-session 'em vẫn nhớ' behaviour.

unresolved.description: Questions user raised that didn't get a confident answer.

promises.description: Things the assistant promised to do/check later.
